# CWE-1333 positive: catastrophic backtracking regex (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-1333-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

// CWE-1333: Inefficient Regular Expression Complexity (ReDoS).
// Vulnerable: nested-quantifier regex applied to unbounded user tag input.

import (
	"net/http"
	"regexp"
	"sync"
)

var tagPatternPure = regexp.MustCompile(`^([a-zA-Z]+)*$`)

var commentStoreMu sync.Mutex
var commentStorePure = map[string]string{}

func ValidateCommentTagPure() http.HandlerFunc {
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		if err := r.ParseForm(); err != nil {
			http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadRequest)
			return
		}
		tag := r.FormValue("tag")
		if !tagPatternPure.MatchString(tag) {
			http.Error(w, "invalid tag", http.StatusBadRequest)
			return
		}
		commentStoreMu.Lock()
		commentStorePure[tag] = r.FormValue("body")
		commentStoreMu.Unlock()
		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusCreated)
	}
}
